Package index

Dependency graphs

Build and visualise package dependency graphs

dep_graph()
Dependency graph plot
dep_graph_create()
Create a dependency graph
dep_graph_create_github()
Create a dependency graph: GitHub
dep_graph_plot()
Dependency graph plot
revdep_graph_create()
Create a reverse dependency graph

Graph manipulation

Layout, merge, and subset dependency graphs

layout_igraph()
igraph layout
layout_star()
Star layout
merge_graphs()
Merge graphs
recursive_graph_join()
Recursively join a list of tbl_graphs
subset_graph()
Subset graph

Package metadata

Retrieve and organise package metadata

package_metadata()
Gather package metadata
is_r_package()
Is R package

Utilities

Colour palettes, format conversion, and publishing helpers

construct_colors()
Construct colors
example_graphs()
Example graphs
html_to_png()
HTML to PNG
visnet_save()
visNetwork save
add_ghpages()
Add GitHub Pages metadata
